symbols.name: FakeSmtpClient
symbols.summary: A fake implementation of MailKit.Net.Smtp.ISmtpClient that logs actions instead of performing real SMTP operations. Useful for testing. Includes a LogKey in each log message.
symbols.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the BridgingIT.DevKit.Application.Notifications.FakeSmtpClient class.

syntax.content: public class FakeSmtpClient : ISmtpClient, IMailTransport, IMailService
